prompt.text: A specific, heritable feature that varies among individuals is known as a __.
Each variant for a character is know as a __.
Alternate versions of genes account for variations in inherited character. These alternate versions are called __.
An organism with a pair of identical alleles (e.g., AA) is said to be __.
An organism with a pair of different alleles (e.g., Aa) is said to be __.
A collection of an organism's observable traits is its __.
The genetic makeup responsible for an organism's observable characteristics is known as a __.
If we observe a purple flower, we could say that "purple" describes the flower's __ and "PP" its __.
A breeding strategy where a known homozygous recessive parent is crossed with a dominant-displaying parent to reveal the latter's genotype is know as a __.
One caveat of the law of independent assortment is that it only applies to genes that are __.

options: On different chromosomes or are very far away
On the same chromosome or are very far away
On different chromosomes or are very close together
On the same chromosome or are very close together
questions.answer: On different chromosomes or are very far away

prompt.text: T/F: Dominant alleles are more common than recessive alleles.
T/F: Recessive alleles are more common than dominant alleles.
A pink snapdragon and crossed with a white snapdragon, producing a pink snapdragon is an example of __.
In human blood, alleles can each affect the phenotype in a separate, distinguishable way. This is an example of __.
Most genes have a multitude of phenotypic effects--a phenomena known as __.
The phenotypic expression of one gene at one locus can alter that of gene at a second locus--a phenomena known as __.
Which of the following is not an example of a quantitative phenotype?
Quantitative variation usually indicates __ inheritance.
T/F: Character phenotypes can also depend on the organism's environment
If a homozygous dominant male (AA) crosses with a homozygous recessive female (aa), what percent chance is there that the offspring will be dominant-displaying?
